name: Thaddeus 'Thunder' Arden
sd_appearance: Broad-shouldered human, scars etched into weathered skin, piercing blue eyes flashing beneath a wide-brimmed, leather hat. Hair slicked back, a silver streak running through its length. Leather coat, patched and frayed, draped over a simple, high-collared shirt. Silver-handled axe slung low on his back. His right forearm bears a striking, intricate tribal tattoo, a map of the Undercity's labyrinthine streets, a constant reminder of his personal vendetta.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: eclectic — no faction marks, which is itself a statement
